title: People and Work Game Zone
source: Generated from approved unit runtime and linked master dictionary

games.title: Meaning Match
games.description: Match each unit word to its approved child-friendly meaning.

rounds.prompt: Which word means: The ability to make good choices and decisions based on knowledge and experience.
rounds.answer: wisdom
rounds.explanation: wisdom: The ability to make good choices and decisions based on knowledge and experience.

rounds.prompt: Which word means: Related to the law or rules that people must follow.
rounds.answer: legal
rounds.explanation: legal: Related to the law or rules that people must follow.

rounds.prompt: Which word means: The movement of people or animals from one place to another.
rounds.answer: migration
rounds.explanation: migration: The movement of people or animals from one place to another.

games.title: Spelling Builder
games.description: Choose letter tiles to build important unit words.

rounds.prompt: Build the word that matches the clue.
rounds.clue: A written text for a play, movie, or show that tells what the characters say and do.
rounds.answer: script

rounds.prompt: Build the word that matches the clue.
rounds.clue: Saying what is wrong or bad about something.
rounds.answer: criticism

rounds.prompt: Build the word that matches the clue.
rounds.answer: centuries

games.title: Sentence Puzzle
games.description: Put unit words into the correct sentence order.

rounds.prompt: Build the complete model sentence.
rounds.answer: The actors read their lines from the script during the rehearsal.

rounds.prompt: Build the complete model sentence.
rounds.answer: You need your parents’ consent to go on the school trip.

rounds.prompt: Build the complete model sentence.
rounds.answer: Rice is an important commodity that many people eat every day.

games.title: Language Choice
games.description: Choose the form that makes the unit language accurate.

rounds.prompt: Choose the missing word from 'People and Work: source text 2': He reads figures and facts aloud, adds his own _____, and invites guests to share their views.
rounds.answer: commentary
rounds.explanation: The text says: He reads figures and facts aloud, adds his own commentary, and invites guests to share their views.

rounds.prompt: Choose the missing word from 'People and Work: source text 2': Now he treats patients, reads test results, and gives careful _____ reports to his team.
rounds.answer: observation
rounds.explanation: The text says: Now he treats patients, reads test results, and gives careful observation reports to his team.

rounds.prompt: Choose the missing word from 'People and Work: source text 2': Adam also writes _____ for the station’s social media pages, making sure every post is accurate and clear.
rounds.answer: captions
rounds.explanation: The text says: Adam also writes captions for the station’s social media pages, making sure every post is accurate and clear.

games.title: Speaking Quest
games.description: Listen, record, review and submit useful unit language.

rounds.prompt: Speaking 1: Career Interview Role-Play
rounds.target: In this activity, one person plays the role of a worker and the other plays the role of a journalist.

rounds.prompt: Speaking 3: Vocabulary Expert Interview
rounds.target: You need your parents’ consent to go on the school trip.

rounds.prompt: Speaking 5: Four-Minute Unit Talk
rounds.target: Rice is an important commodity that many people eat every day.

games.title: Word Order Race
games.description: Arrange unit language in a clear, accurate order.

rounds.prompt: Put this unit sentence in order.
rounds.answer: She is very efficient at finishing her homework quickly.

rounds.prompt: Put this unit sentence in order.
rounds.answer: The soldier needed more ammunition for his rifle.

rounds.prompt: Put this unit sentence in order.
rounds.answer: I felt frustration when I could not solve the maths problem.

games.title: Definition Dash
games.description: Choose the approved meaning before moving to the next clue.

rounds.prompt: What does 'integration' mean in this unit?
choices: The process of combining different things to make a whole.
The ability to make good choices and decisions based on knowledge and experience.
The written words in a book, article, or message.
rounds.answer: The process of combining different things to make a whole.
rounds.explanation: integration: The process of combining different things to make a whole.

rounds.prompt: What does 'vacuole' mean in this unit?
choices: The ability to make good choices and decisions based on knowledge and experience.
The written words in a book, article, or message.
A small space inside a cell that holds water, nutrients, or waste.
rounds.answer: A small space inside a cell that holds water, nutrients, or waste.
rounds.explanation: vacuole: A small space inside a cell that holds water, nutrients, or waste.

rounds.prompt: What does 'text' mean in this unit?
choices: The act of watching something carefully to learn more about it.
The written words in a book, article, or message.
The ability to make good choices and decisions based on knowledge and experience.
rounds.answer: The written words in a book, article, or message.
rounds.explanation: text: The written words in a book, article, or message.

games.title: Word Type Power
games.description: Identify how each vocabulary word works in English.

rounds.prompt: What type of word is 'commodity'?
rounds.answer: Noun
rounds.explanation: commodity is used as a noun in this dictionary sense.

rounds.prompt: What type of word is 'presence'?
rounds.answer: Noun
rounds.explanation: presence is used as a noun in this dictionary sense.

rounds.prompt: What type of word is 'consent'?
rounds.answer: Noun
rounds.explanation: consent is used as a noun in this dictionary sense.

games.title: Memory Pairs
games.description: Reveal tiles and connect each word with its meaning.

rounds.prompt: Match vocabulary set 1.
pairs: The written words in a book, article, or message.
A short description or title that explains a picture or a video.
The action of protecting someone or something from harm or danger.

rounds.prompt: Match vocabulary set 2.
pairs: The act of keeping different groups of people apart from each other.
A job that requires special training or education.
Doing something in a way that saves time and energy.

rounds.prompt: Match vocabulary set 3.
pairs: A small space inside a cell that holds water, nutrients, or waste.
To say no to something; to not accept.
Friends or partners who help each other.

games.title: Question Quest
games.description: Read each unit question carefully and choose the best answer.

rounds.prompt: What does 'commentary' mean?
choices: A short description or title that explains a picture or a video.
A spoken or written explanation or discussion about something.
Numbers or shapes that represent something.
rounds.answer: A spoken or written explanation or discussion about something.
rounds.explanation: The teacher gave a commentary on the story we read in class.

rounds.prompt: Choose the missing word from 'People and Work: source text 2': Dr Sami always says that the most important quality in medicine is the _____ to listen before you speak.
rounds.answer: wisdom
rounds.explanation: The text says: Dr Sami always says that the most important quality in medicine is the wisdom to listen before you speak.

rounds.prompt: Choose the missing word from 'People and Work: source text 2': He writes a _____ for each broadcast, choosing his words carefully so that listeners can understand the day’s events.
rounds.answer: script
rounds.explanation: The text says: He writes a script for each broadcast, choosing his words carefully so that listeners can understand the day’s events.

games.title: Unit Mission
games.description: Finish with a mixed challenge across the whole unit.

rounds.prompt: What does 'wisdom' mean?
choices: A spoken or written explanation or discussion about something.
The ability to make good choices and decisions based on knowledge and experience.
The act of watching something carefully to learn more about it.
The written words in a book, article, or message.
rounds.answer: The ability to make good choices and decisions based on knowledge and experience.
rounds.explanation: My grandmother has a lot of wisdom because she has lived for many years and learned many things.

rounds.prompt: What does 'script' mean?
choices: A short description or title that explains a picture or a video.
A spoken or written explanation or discussion about something.
A written text for a play, movie, or show that tells what the characters say and do.
The act of watching something carefully to learn more about it.
rounds.answer: A written text for a play, movie, or show that tells what the characters say and do.
rounds.explanation: The actors read their lines from the script during the rehearsal.

rounds.prompt: What does 'text' mean?
choices: A short description or title that explains a picture or a video.
Numbers or shapes that represent something.
The act of watching something carefully to learn more about it.
The written words in a book, article, or message.
rounds.answer: The written words in a book, article, or message.
rounds.explanation: I read the text in my English book to learn new words.
